calendar.matters:
AMENDED ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Oct-30-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan, Clerks: S. Ravinantapricha/V.Mack, CSR: Lavon Granger.
Petitioner, Jenneth S. Tunque present in pro per and with the minor's father Bounson Sivongsa, parties present were sworn and examined.
The Court grants the petition for change of the MINOR'S name to: James Brian Tunque Sivongsa.
Decree signed in open court.

AMENDED ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Oct-28-2003 Reset To Oct-30-03 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218 For Order To Show Cause
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan, Clerks: S. Ravinantapricha/V.Mack, CSR: Dave Davenport.

Petitioner Jenneth Santos Tunque present for minor in pro per, was sworn and examined.
A proof of publication was faxed to the court by Asianweek and presented by petitioner. An error in spelling occurred in publication. The correct name for the minor is JAMES BRIAN TUNQUE SIVONGSA.
The matter is continued to Oct. 30, 2003 at 9:00 am in Dept. 218. Father of minor is to appear and be sworn. Petitioner need not be present. Petitioner is to call Dept. 218 and schedule another date if the father cannot appear on Oct. 30, 2003.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Sep-09-2003 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan, Clerks: S. Ravinantapricha/V. Mack, CSR: Leticia Perez.

There being no appearances, this matter is ordered off calendar.
